rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: In-memory Downloading and Compiling of Applets as Payloads

rules.rule_text:
title: In-memory Downloading and Compiling of Applets as Payloads
id: 75933b00-4949-4cf0-a0e0-f234c3ff1407
status: experimental
description: "This analytic uses a single ES_EVENT_TYPE_NOTIFY_EXEC event and looks\
  \ for \nthe the execution of curl, |, or osacompile commands. Part of the RedCanary\
  \ \n2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/applescript/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1059.002
logsource:
  product: macos
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - osascript
    - '|'
    - curl
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
